description: Add task status values, UI badges, and filtering

userStories.title: Add task status schema and migration
userStories.description: As a user, tasks should store a status value (pending/in_progress/done) so task state persists.
acceptanceCriteria: Add status column to tasks table with default 'pending'

userStories.title: Backend: update task status action
userStories.description: As a user, I can change a task's status from the API so status updates persist.
acceptanceCriteria: Add API endpoint or action to update status

userStories.title: Show status badge on task card
userStories.description: As a user, I see a badge on each task card showing current status so I can scan tasks quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Task cards display status badge with Pending/In Progress/Done
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Add status control to task rows
userStories.description: As a user, I can change status from the task list via a control (dropdown or quick action) so updates are quick.
acceptanceCriteria: Inline control updates status via API
Optimistic UI or proper loading state
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill

userStories.title: Filter task list by status
userStories.description: As a user, I can filter task list by Pending/In Progress/Done so I focus on specific work.
acceptanceCriteria: Add filter control to task list UI
Filter persists in query params or UI state
Verify in browser using playwright-cli skill
